title: Vision Guide 8.0 Software Installation
description:
Vision Guide 8.0 Software Installation

Vision Guide 8.0 Software Installation

Vision Guide 8.0 is included in the Epson RC+ 8.0.

Follow the instructions in the Epson RC+ 8.0 User's Guide for installing the Epson RC+ 8.0.

To use PV1 (PC Vision), select the GigE camera driver option from Epson RC+ 8.0 - [Setup] - [Options].

Software Option Key

To use the following functions of the Vision Guide, software option key should be enabled.

PV1
	 (PC Vision)

OCR
	 function

For details on the option key, refer to Options Command (Setup Menu) in the Epson RC+ 8.0 User's Guide.

PC Vision Software Option Key

This is a software option key for using the PV1 (PC Vision).

The option key will be stored in the Robot Controller.
  Therefore, enable the option key after connecting to the Controller.

Tip:

This software option key is not necessary when you use the CV2.

OCR Software Option Key

This is a software option key for using the OCR function.

The option key will be stored in the Robot Controller.
  Therefore, enable the option key after connecting to the Controller.
